## Description

What does this change do?

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New detector
- [ ] New command
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] Detector registered in `audit/detectors/__init__.py` (if adding a detector)

## Evidence

```
dm audit --path . --detector <name>
# paste output showing it works
```
